title: The Worst Shin Sonic Mod
description: Adds Shin Sonic into the game as a boss mob that will grow bigger as he eats!
body:
Since nobody else has made this for 1.20.1 Java Forge specifically, as far as I'm aware, I decided to do it myself. This is my first mod, so please forgive me if it is underwhelming. I hope to make it something more enjoyable as I continue learn MCreator and Blockbench.

As of right now, Shinic's first, Second, and third forms are in the mod, among other things which you can read about here.

**SUMMONING SHIN SONIC**

To summon Shin Sonic, you will need to craft the statue of Moloch, though obtaining the materials needed to do so may take you some time. First, you will need to make 2 red slimes by dying green slime with red dye.

![red slime crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/934d36421c2eb61569b4587b6cbcde8426c224b7.png)

Next, you will need to craft 1 evil eye of Ender with 8 rotten flesh and an eye of Ender.

![evil eye crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2953e057896fbf64b895e882eb0e613b46ac53ba.png)

Then you will use those, some more rotten flesh, and some bones to craft the Heart of Moloch.

![heart of moloch crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0812faea660f47488c68de077ec30881fc247301.png)

And finally, you can use the Heart, any leaves, and some cracked stone to make the statue to summon Shin Sonic!

![Statue of Moloch crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af9f5c1b907a4a14897b3731b365152b571c168.png)

After placing down the Statue and right-clicking on it, Shin Sonic will spawn and will not despawn until killed. You can also use the statue to summon him again after he has died if he drowned too fast, or you just want to play with him again! Also, there can normally not be more than one Shinic in existence at a time, as the statue will not work if you click it when Shinic is still alive, but you can use spawn eggs to mess around with a bunch of them if you want lol

**SHINIC EVOLUTION 1**

 After placing down the Statue and right-clicking on it, Shin Sonic will spawn. He will attack and eat cows, chickens, pigs, and sheep for food, and attack the player if provoked. Since I want this to be more than just "a dweller mod, but it's Shin Sonic", He only does 2 hearts of damage when you have no armor and can be killed easily with a stone sword if you don't give him the chance to hit you, though he will be much stronger if you allow him to eat 10 mobs and evolve into his second form. Also, in this form, Shinic can't swim, like most versions of Sonic, and will eventually drown if he gets stuck in a body of water.

**SHINIC EVOLUTION 2**

In this Form, Shinic will no longer tolerate you existing around him and will attack players on sight. He is significantly faster than he was in his first form and will also eat villagers now. He will evolve into his third form after eating 20 mobs. Shinic can now swim and no longer breaths super loudly, as well as hitting way harder too. He is not a world-ending threat just yet, but it is best to take this form more seriously than the first.

**SHINIC EVOLUTION 3**

In this form, Shinic is actually ever so slightly slower than evo2 due to evo2 already being annoying to fight because of his speed, though he has had his other stats buffed in turn. His follow and Tracking range have been doubled, he has a step height of 1 block, and is now immune to drowning because his lungs are too big for him to run out of air. Not likely to be beatable without mid-game level gear or greater.

All forms of Shinic drop a fresh pot of Hedgehog stew when they die.

**THE EGGMAN UPDATE!!!!**

By far, what took up the most of my time while working on v1.3 was all the Eggman things I came up with and just decided to add them for fun instead of just focusing on making shinic. I also wanted an excuse to make a bunch of cool weapons and things to fight Shin Sonic with, and figured reviving Eggman was the best way to do it. Plus I also have this headcannon of Eggman having been recently redeemed not long before Sonic was possessed by Moloch in the original shin sonic tapes, which is my explanation for why in the season 1 finale Metal Sonic and Metal overlord are revealed to have existed the whole time even though in the second episode/prequel episode Eggman is portrayed as a good guy who only puts Flickies in badniks if the Flickies give consent, most likey to protect them from whatever was eating them not knowing it was a possessed sonic.

Anyway, Eggman is still dead, so if you wanna get cool stuff from him to kill Shinic, you'll need to fix that. Once you have located the egg fortress structure (I recommend either using "/locate structure" or the explorer's compass mod), feel free to loot the chests on the ground level; you're gonna need the stuff in them. Then make your way to Eggman's Dead body and build a robotizer to revive him by turning him into Robo-robotnik. Once you have the materials, remove his brain and put it in the machine. You will also need an empty vessel for his brain, which you can build the two of like this:

![robotizirer recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a6728e247c5ddde3eb05bf7b9f795938f2e9d71.png)

![vessel recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2f9abb996daf732d2250aa78b4f1e5362ab1391.png)

I'm too lazy to put pics of every recipe, so please use JEI to figure out what to do😅

Once he is alive again, you can right-click on him to open an upgrade menu, which has two recipes right now. Either add a shield and a stack of scraps for a spring shield, which is twice as durable as a normal shield, or add an iron sword and a stack of scraps for an egg saber, a fast and deadly lightsaber branded with Eggman's face on the hilt.

There are also spawners you can use to make eggpawns, which can be tamed using egg remotes.

![egg remote craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7c5f8f079df79eab30f913c49c4d81238878f6b.png)

They are very fragile and not good for much more than a distraction, but they are very cheap to produce! Don't worry tho, you'll get some better robots to play with soon!😉

I will add more information about the mod as I update it. Constructive criticism would be greatly appreciated!
